title: Brain Tumor Segmentation
response: My Brain Tumor Segmentation project uses an advanced U-Net architecture built with PyTorch and MONAI to segment low-contrast MRI scans. I achieved an 8.5% improvement in Dice Score over baseline models. You can view the full architecture and results in the Projects section.

title: DRDO Radar Anomaly Detection
response: At DRDO, I developed an anomaly detection system for radar tracking. The pipeline filters out complex environmental clutter to identify true signals, using custom DSP and deep learning models. It's a highly robust defense-grade system.

title: Telugu LLM @ IIIT Hyderabad
response: During my research at IIIT Hyderabad, I contributed to building a Telugu Language Model. This involved massive dataset curation, custom tokenization, and pre-training transformer architectures to handle the morphological richness of the Telugu language.

title: Machine Learning Frameworks
response: I specialize in PyTorch for deep learning research, but I'm also highly proficient in TensorFlow and JAX. I frequently use MONAI for medical imaging tasks and Scikit-learn for traditional ML baselines.

title: Frontend & Fullstack
response: I build my user interfaces and dashboards using Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. I use Framer Motion for cinematic animations and Firebase for real-time data and authentication.

title: Contact & Hiring
response: You can reach me via email at nvishnu1014@gmail.com. You can also find my resume, GitHub, and LinkedIn links in the header of this portfolio.

title: About Me
response: I am an AI Researcher and Engineer. I build intelligent systems, specializing in Medical AI, Computer Vision, and NLP. My focus is on moving deep learning from experimental notebooks into robust, production-ready engineering environments.
